历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 11,313; in 2023, approximately 3,636; in 2024, approximately 2,051; in 2025, approximately 2,152 for the Physics category. From 2022 to 2023, the ranking moved significantly forward by about 7,677 places; from 2023 to 2024, it continued to move forward to 2,051; from 2024 to 2025, it remained basically stable around 2,152; rankings have stabilized in recent two years, with a baseline of about 2,152 in 2025. In 2022, the science enrollment plan was 37; in 2023, 34; in 2024, 34; in 2025, 33 for the Physics category. In 2026, the Physics category enrollment plan is 29, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a reduction of about 12.1%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 40-46 in recent years; the university level is relatively high, maintaining sustained attraction for candidates. In 2024, reputation was slightly positive (cafeteria improvements); in 2026, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), overall attention is moderately high. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded; Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-, weakly related to enrollment majors. However, Soochow University's medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Radiation Medicine) and Computer/Electronic Information majors have extremely high rankings in Ningxia enrollment, reflecting the recognition of related discipline strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology remain highly popular in society. Soochow University's enrollment in Ningxia Physics category mainly focuses on these popular engineering and medical majors, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 66,000 (including uncertain marks), basically unchanged from 2025, with a stable competition landscape. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Ningxia candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 0.5%-0.8%, a small-scale enrollment province, making ranking sensitive to enrollment number changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2,152, the 2026 Physics category enrollment plan reduction of 4 (-12.1%) leading to intensified competition, sustained high popularity of hot engineering and medical majors, and stable university level, it is expected that the lowest ranking for the 2026 Physics category will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition becomes fiercer). The predicted lowest ranking is about 2,120, with a range of 1,800-2,440.
